capabilities.name: mail.thread
capabilities.description: Message threading, chatter integration, subtypes, message posting, followers, and subtype-driven notifications on any model inheriting mail.thread.
examples: Post an internal note vs a public message from code
Add followers programmatically with specific subtypes
Track field changes and notify followers
Override _message_post_after_hook to trigger custom logic

capabilities.name: Mail Activities
capabilities.description: Schedule, complete, and manage activities via mail.activity.mixin. Covers activity types, activity plans, suggested next activities, calendar integration, and deadline handling.
examples: Schedule a call activity for a sales lead
Configure an activity plan with multiple steps
Set up automatic suggested next activities
Create a custom activity type with a default note template

capabilities.name: Email Templates
capabilities.description: Design and render QWeb-based email templates (mail.template), including dynamic placeholders, inline styles, report attachments, template inheritance, and multi-language rendering.
examples: Create a sales order confirmation email template
Add conditional blocks based on partner language
Attach a PDF report automatically
Override the default email layout.xml footer

capabilities.name: Notifications
capabilities.description: Deliver in-app, email, and push notifications. Covers mail.notification records, notification_status, notification_type, failure handling, and digest emails.
examples: Send an in-app mention notification
Configure which subtypes trigger emails
Retry failed email notifications
Customize the digest email frequency

capabilities.name: Bounce Handling
capabilities.description: Detect and process bounced emails, classify failure types (mail_bounce, mail_smtp, mail_spam, etc.), update mail.blacklist, and disable auto-sent messages after repeated failures.
examples: Diagnose why outbound emails are bouncing
Manually blacklist an email address
Configure bounce alias and catchall domain
Review bounce reasons from mail.notification

capabilities.name: Discuss Channels
capabilities.description: Use mail.channel for group and direct-message conversations, including channel members, moderation, guest access, livechat integration, and message routing to channels.
examples: Create a private channel for a project team
Route incoming WhatsApp messages to a channel
Set up a public channel for customer support
Manage channel membership and permissions

capabilities.name: Mail Gateway
capabilities.description: Inbound and outbound email routing: catchall alias parsing, mail.alias records, message_route, message_route_process, mail.thread gateway methods, and SMTP/imap configuration.
examples: Configure a catchall alias for lead creation
Route support emails to the correct team alias
Create records from inbound emails via mail.alias
Debug why inbound emails are not processed

capabilities.name: Mail Blacklist
capabilities.description: Manage opt-out and bounced email addresses with mail.blacklist. Integrates with mail.thread.blacklist mixin and mass-mailing compliance.
examples: Check if a partner is blacklisted before sending
Bulk import opt-out addresses
Override blacklist behavior in a custom model
Report on blacklisted emails and reasons

capabilities.name: Follow / Unfollow
capabilities.description: Subscribe and unsubscribe partners or channels to record threads, control subtype preferences, and manage default followers on record creation.
examples: Add a customer as a follower with only 'Discussion' subtype
Remove all followers except the assigned user
Set default followers via automated action
Subscribe a user channel to a project

capabilities.name: Mail Tracking
capabilities.description: Track email opens, link clicks, and replies using mail.tracking.value and tracking metadata. Understand mail.mail state flow (outgoing, sent, received, exception, cancelled).
examples: Check delivery status of a sent email
Track how long a record stayed in each stage
Debug emails stuck in 'outgoing' state
Add tracking to a custom field
